sql: SELECT id, name, 'active' as source FROM users WHERE status = #{status} UNION SELECT id, name, 'inactive' as source FROM users WHERE status = 'inactive' ORDER BY #{sortField}
templateSql:
SELECT id, name, 'active' as source FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
</where>
UNION
SELECT id, name, 'inactive' as source FROM users
<where>
    <if test="includeInactive == true">
        AND status = 'inactive'
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
